subcodes.first_line: O Javád! Upon thee be the glory of God and His mercy. Thy letter hath indeed come into Our presence and been read by this servant who standeth before His countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جواد علیک بهاء الله و رحمته قد حضر کتابک و قرئه العبد الحاضر لدی الوجه و
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @consolation and comfort, @presence of; reunion with God
